issues.description: Second effect has trigger 'Trigger' which is incomplete/ambiguous. Official text shows only one effect (OnPlay). If this represents a second mode, the trigger condition is missing from card text.
Second effect maxCost is 3, but official text states 'cost of 6 or less'. Both effects should have maxCost:6.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Return up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less to the owner's hand.
